ui_ux_design_principles.value: Build for creators: Prioritize individual productivity and end-user efficiency over rigid corporate reporting needs.
Purpose-built: Design specialized tools for specific tasks rather than generic, overly flexible solutions that lead to complexity.
Quality is a feature: Performance, speed, and visual polish are fundamental product requirements, not afterthoughts.
Keyboard-first: Design interfaces that empower power users to navigate and perform actions entirely via keyboard shortcuts.
Aim for clarity: Use simple, unambiguous terminology and mental models (e.g., calling projects 'Projects').
Simple first, then powerful: Maintain a clean initial experience that reveals deeper complexity and power as the user's needs scale.
Create momentum: Use predictable cycles and milestones to foster steady progress and visibility into work health.
Say no to busy work: Automate or eliminate administrative tasks so the system works for the user, reducing 'work-around-work'.

dashboard_components.value: Command Menu (Cmd+K): A global search and action bar that provides instant access to navigation and common commands.
Activity Feed: A real-time stream of updates, mentions, and state changes across the organization.
High-density Lists: Compact, filterable tables with customizable columns and status badges for large data sets.
Progress Cycles: Visual indicators of current work period health, showing velocity, burndown, and completion rates.
Saved Custom Views: User-defined dashboards based on complex filters for specific workflows or departments.
Inbox/Notifications: A central hub for managing pending approvals, mentions, and urgent alerts.
Swimlanes: Grouping mechanisms for board views that allow users to categorize records (e.g., by priority or department) horizontally.

feature_patterns.value: Omnisearch: A single search entry point that indexes all entities, including people, records, and documentation.
Batch Editing: Multi-select capabilities combined with a command bar for rapid, high-volume record updates.
Optimistic UI Updates: UI state changes occur immediately upon user interaction, with server syncing happening in the background.
Peek View / Preview Panel: Opening record details in a side drawer or modal overlay without losing the current list context.
Dynamic Filtering: Real-time, faceted filtering that updates views instantly as users select attributes.
Contextual Action Menus: Right-click or hover menus that provide relevant actions based on the specific record or state.

layout_considerations.value: Vertical Sidebar Navigation: A persistent left-hand navigation bar focusing on core workspace areas and personalized views.
Breadcrumb-led Header: A utility-focused header that uses breadcrumbs for deep navigation within complex ERP hierarchies.
Dual-pane Detail View: A split-screen layout where the main list remains on the left while item details appear on the right.
Collapsible Workspace Sections: Allowing users to minimize or expand sidebar categories to reduce visual noise.
Modal Utility Overlays: Use of center-focused modals for rapid entry (e.g., 'New Invoice') without page transitions.

density_considerations.value: 8px Spacing System: A strict geometric grid that maintains consistent, tight padding and margins throughout the UI.
Compact Typography: Use of 12-14px font sizes for secondary data and labels to increase information density.
Minimalist Borders: Use of very light, 1px borders and subtle shadows to define boundaries without visual heaviness.
Information Hierarchy via Muting: Using lower-contrast colors for IDs, dates, and secondary metadata to highlight primary titles.
Iconic Representation: Replacing text labels with distinctive icons in lists to save horizontal space.

interaction_models.value: Command Palette Interaction: Executing complex commands and navigation by typing in a centralized Cmd+K input.
Keyboard Shortcut Mapping: Mapping nearly every UI action (e.g., 's' for status, 'a' for assignee) to single keys.
Drag-and-Drop Task Management: Smooth interaction for moving records between statuses or reordering in a list.
Real-time Collaborative Indicators: Displaying live presence and typing indicators to prevent record locking/collisions.
Hover-to-Reveal: Displaying actions or additional metadata on hover to keep the interface clean during passive reading.
